title: How to How to Start Selling Digital Products with Crypto: The Complete Creator Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in a restricted country like Nigeria, Ghana, or Iran, you know how hard it is to sell your ebooks, courses, or templates online without PayPal or Stripe. Geographic restrictions and banking limitations can block you from using popular platforms like Gumroad or Payhip, leaving you without a way to collect payments. But there's a solution that bypasses these restrictions and lets you start selling your digital products with crypto.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The traditional payment processing systems often fail creators in restricted countries due to KYC requirements or banking limitations. However, using crypto as a payment method eliminates these barriers, allowing you to receive payments from anywhere in the world. With the right tools, you can set up a fully automated payment and delivery pipeline that doesn't require a payment processor account, giving you the freedom to sell your digital products globally.
What You Need Before You Start

To start selling digital products with crypto, you'll need a few essential tools. First, you'll need a way to integrate crypto payments into your website, which can be done using a solution like Web3 Wallet Connect. You'll also need a system for automated delivery of your digital products, as well as a way to manage transactions and orders. With these tools in place, you can create a seamless and secure payment experience for your customers.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Setting up your payment and delivery pipeline is straightforward. You'll start by integrating a crypto payment gateway into your website, which will allow customers to pay in a variety of cryptocurrencies. Next, you'll set up an automated delivery system that sends your digital products to customers immediately after payment. This ensures a smooth and secure transaction process, and eliminates the need for manual intervention.
Sell digital products without PayPal or Stripe restrictions.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once your payment and delivery pipeline is set up, you're ready to go live and start making sales. You'll need to configure your store settings, add your digital products, and customize your checkout experience. With a fully automated system in place, you can focus on marketing and promoting your products, rather than worrying about the technical details of payment processing.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Scaling a crypto-native digital store does not require changing infrastructure at any particular revenue level. The Core Shop Engine handles payment verification and delivery through the same webhook pipeline whether you are processing five orders a month or five hundred. GitHub Pages scales to any traffic level automatically. NOWPayments handles volume without per-transaction approval delays. The only constraint as you scale is marketing — the technical infrastructure is the same on day one as it is at significant revenue. This is a meaningful advantage over platform-based alternatives where payout policies, fee structures, and compliance requirements often change as your volume increases.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Integrate crypto payments with Web3 Wallet Connect.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a way to sell notion templates for bitcoin, or create a digital download store that accepts crypto only, you'll need a solution like Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) to integrate crypto payments into your website. You can find more tools and resources at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to help you get started.
Your Action Checklist

To start selling digital products with crypto, take the following steps: configure your store settings and add your digital products, integrate a crypto payment gateway into your website, set up an automated delivery system, customize your checkout experience, and test your system to ensure everything is working smoothly. With these steps complete, you'll be ready to go live and start making sales.
Automate delivery and focus on marketing and growth.
